---
title: "Course README"
---

# Essential Digital Skills

Essential Digital Skills is a foundation course for digital research practice at the University of Nottingham. It focuses on practical workflows for collaboration, governance, data management, and responsible digital practice.

## Course Scope

The course supports participants to:

- use institutional digital tools effectively,
- apply data governance and policy in day-to-day work,
- organise, explore, and communicate data outputs,
- make defensible decisions when using AI in research contexts.

## Contributing

Contribution guidance is available in [CONTRIBUTING.qmd](CONTRIBUTING.qmd).

## Supporting Documents

- [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.qmd)
- [License](LICENSE.qmd)
- [Learner Profiles](profiles/learner-profiles.qmd)
